docstring: Run command, return stdout. Raises RuntimeError on failure if check=True.
name: run

docstring: Run command with output shown to user.
name: run_visible

name: detect_compose

name: wait_docker

docstring: Create .env.local from example if missing.
name: ensure_env_local

docstring: Ensure .env.prod exists for production.
name: ensure_env_prod

docstring: Start the Vite dev server as a background process.
name: start_admin

docstring: Write apps/mobile/.env with the machine's LAN IP for Expo dev.

docstring: Merge /data/mosques/**/*.json into the mobile app's bundled asset.
name: generate_mosque_bundle

docstring: Upfront checks for Node, npm, Java, and Android SDK before any build work.
name: _check_android_prerequisites

docstring:
Fix MissingPropertyException for 'components.release' in ExpoModulesCorePlugin.gradle.
AGP 8.3 (used by React Native 0.74) registers the release SoftwareComponent later
in the lifecycle than AGP 8.1,
name: _patch_expo_modules_core_gradle

docstring:
Pin Gradle wrapper to exactly 8.7.
- Gradle â‰¤8.6 ships with ASM 9.5 which crashes on kotlin-compiler-embeddable
  1.9.24 class files (ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException in ClassReader).
- Gradle 8.7 shi
name: _patch_gradle_wrapper

docstring:
On Windows, downgrade NDK 26.1.10909125 â†’ 25.1.8937393.

NDK 26.1 ships with a broken ld.lld.exe on Windows that fails with
'Unknown error (0xC1)' when linking any C/C++ code (e.g. expo-av,
expo-mod
name: _patch_ndk_version

docstring:
Scan settings.gradle for includeBuild entries and verify each path exists.
Emits clear diagnostics so the cause of 'Included build does not exist' errors
is visible before Gradle even starts.
name: _preflight_check_settings_gradle

docstring: Patch AndroidManifest.xml to allow plain HTTP for local dev.
name: _ensure_cleartext_traffic

docstring: Build Android APK for the mobile app.
name: cmd_android

docstring: Read a single key from a .env file.
name: _read_env_value

docstring:
Generate a minimal valid RGBA PNG.
pixels: callable(x, y) -> (r, g, b, a) tuple
name: _make_png
signature: def _make_png(width: int, height: int, pixels) -> bytes

name: _in_circle
signature: def _in_circle(x: int, y: int, cx: float, cy: float, r: float) -> bool

docstring: Brand-green background, white crescent + dot.
name: _icon_pixel
signature: def _icon_pixel(x: int, y: int, size: int)

docstring: Brand-green fill with a centred white crescent (larger).
name: _splash_pixel

name: _make_silent_wav

docstring: Lowercase, replace spaces/special chars with underscores.
name: slugify
